channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Mobilizes Domestic Funds to Combat HIV/AIDS Epidemic
item.description: The Tanzanian government, in partnership with the Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (GFATM), has successfully collected 2.6 billion shillings through a dedicated levy system to fund ...

item.title: APM announces Bala as Makinde's vice-presidential candidate for 2027 election
item.description: The Allied Peoples’ Movement (APM) has officially nominated Ibrahim Adamu Bala as the running mate for Governor Seyi Makinde in the 2027 presidential election. This choice gives the party a South-Nort...

item.title: Strong El Niño Event Threatens California and Global Climate
item.description: The article discusses the potential impacts of a 'super' El Niño event, which is expected to bring extreme weather conditions, rising ocean temperatures, and heightened risks for California and the gl...

item.title: Kalyani Pramod’s Art Exhibition in Chennai Uses Recycled Materials to Highlight Endangered Species
item.description: Kalyani Pramod, a Chennai-based fibre artist, is set to unveil her solo exhibition 'The Last Glimpse' at Alliance Française of Madras from July 18 to 31. The exhibition features 73 mixed-media textile...

item.title: Kenya Ranks 19th Globally in English Proficiency
item.description: Kenya has ranked 19th globally in English proficiency according to the 2025 EF English Proficiency Index, scoring 593 points. This places Kenya in the 'high proficiency' category, surpassing East Afri...

item.title: Zanzibar's VP Highlights Legal Reforms for National Development
item.description: Zanzibar’s Second Vice-President, Hemed Suleiman Abdulla, emphasized the importance of viewing Tanzania’s legal system as a catalyst for national development and economic growth rather than a restrict...

item.title: Essential winter garden tasks for a thriving spring
item.description: As winter weather sets in across Australia, it's the perfect time to focus on garden maintenance tasks that will ensure a successful spring. Key activities include checking mulch depth to retain soil ...

item.title: Kithure Kindiki Leads as Preferred Running Mate for William Ruto in 2027 Poll
item.description: A new opinion poll by Infotrack Research has revealed that Deputy President Kithure Kindiki is the most preferred running mate for President William Ruto ahead of the 2027 general election. The survey...

item.title: House Prosecution Prioritizes Evidence Over Vote-Counting in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The House prosecution team emphasized their strategy of focusing on building an 'airtight' case against Vice President Sara Duterte rather than speculating on the number of votes needed for conviction...

item.title: Goldberg's Loyalty Campaign Rewards Fans with Global Adventures
item.description: Goldberg's Back to Bar campaign transformed everyday customers into global adventurers by rewarding them with all-expenses-paid trips to London and Qatar. The initiative, which began with a simple bar...

item.title: Zanzibar Records 69,605 Tourist Arrivals in June 2026 as European Visitors Continue to Lead
item.description: Zanzibar recorded 69,605 tourist arrivals in June 2026, marking a 3.1% increase compared with the 67,496 visitors received in June 2025. The figures, released by the Zanzibar Commission for Tourism, a...

item.title: Pakistan Commits to Women's Empowerment Through Legal and Policy Reforms
item.description: Pakistan has emphasized women's empowerment as a national priority, with Law Minister Azam Nazeer Tarar highlighting its constitutional foundation and alignment with Islamic principles. At the 9th OIC...

item.title: Human History as the Final Moments of Earth's Timeline
item.description: This article explores the concept of compressing Earth's 4.5 billion-year history into a single calendar year, highlighting how human emergence and key milestones occur in its final moments. Humans ap...

item.title: Supreme Court Orders Status Report on Ram Temple Donation Probe
item.description: The Supreme Court has directed the Uttar Pradesh government to submit a status report on the investigation into alleged embezzlement of donations made to the Ram temple in Ayodhya. A bench led by Chie...

item.title: WHO report highlights urgent need for cancer prevention as cases rise globally
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) warns that cancer cases could surge to 35 million annually by 2050, a 67% jump from current figures. This rise is attributed to lifestyle factors like obesity, ultr...

item.title: Key Tech and Industrials Stocks to Monitor in July 2026
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's live coverage highlights critical stock movements on July 13, 2026, focusing on SK Hynix, Intel, and Akzo Nobel. SK Hynix, a leading memory chip manufacturer, faces pressure ...

item.title: Two men missing after flood incidents in Zamboanga del Sur
item.description: Rescue teams are still searching for two men who went missing after being swept away by floodwaters in Zamboanga del Sur. Joel Ompoc, 24, and King Amir Montilla, 23, were last seen in separate inciden...

item.title: Diamond Platnumz’s Wife Announces Marriage Breakup After 6 Years
item.description: Singer Zuchu, wife of Tanzanian music star Diamond Platnumz, has announced the end of their marriage after six years of being together. The couple, who tied the knot in June 2025, officially separated...

item.title: Marcos to hold working visit in Singapore to strengthen bilateral ties and meet business leaders
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. is set to undertake a working visit to Singapore from July 14 to 16, 2026, as part of the Philippine government's continuing efforts to strengthen bilateral r...

item.title: Wimbledon 2026: Winners, Highlights, and Key Moments
item.description: The Wimbledon 2026 tournament concluded with Jannik Sinner and Linda Noskova emerging as the champions, marking a significant moment in tennis history. Sinner's victory over Alexander Zverev in a thri...
